artifacts_policy: Generated harness files were written outside this metadata repo and outside the BRender source checkout. No BRender source, generated binaries, private assets, or restricted SDK material are committed.
next_actions: run CMake configure against the generated harness
record compiler transcript as a separate attempt
public_notes: This records the first public-safe materializer smoke run for the BRender pilot. It proves the metadata tool can emit an out-of-tree harness scaffold without copying source into this repo.
result_summary: Materializer wrote CMakeLists.txt, README.md, cmake/brender-core-sources.cmake, and harness-manifest.json into the external harness workspace.
